title: Prop
description: A proposition literal — a fact-shaped claim per design/substrate-prop-literal-sketch-01. Two fields; atomic primitive args only; structurally hashable (PL6); timeless at record level (PL7).

predicate.description: Relation name from an open per-story vocabulary (PL2). Two substrate-reserved names at v1: 'identity' (identity-and-realization-sketch-01) and 'at_location' (unity-of-place checks).

args.description: Ordered tuple of atomic primitive values (PL3, PL4). Strings are Entity-id references; integer/number/boolean are literal values with structural fold-consequence. PL5 prohibits nested/composite/null values; enforced by items' anyOf. (anyOf, not oneOf: in JSON Schema, integers validate against both 'integer' and 'number' types, so oneOf would always fail on integer args; anyOf admits any of the four primitive types correctly.)
